channel.title: hydra on geobour98
channel.description: Recent content in hydra on geobour98

item.title: Proving Grounds - DC-4
item.description: Introduction This is a Proving Grounds room which can be found at: DC-4 A double edged sword Reconnaissance & Scanning Perform nmap scan to identify open ports and services. Command: nmap -p- -T4 -v 192.168.142.195 geobour98@kali:~$ nmap -p- -T4 -v 192.168.142.195 Starting Nmap 7.92 ( https://nmap.org ) at 2022-09-28 19:48 EEST Initiating Ping Scan at 19:48 Scanning 192.168.142.195 [2 ports] Completed Ping Scan at 19:48, 0.05s elapsed (1 total hosts) Initiating Parallel DNS resolution of 1 host.
